SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Interface IScanResult

public interface IScanResult
Per-host result from a scan with section-level detail.
Author:
Milton Smith

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<ScanSection>
    getCompletedSections()
    Which sections completed successfully for this host.
    Duration
    getDuration()
    How long the scan took.
    Instant
    getEndTime()
    When the scan ended.
    IEngine
    getEngine()
    The engine, or null on failure.
    DeepVioletException
    getError()
    The error, or null on success.
    ISession
    getSession()
    The session, or null on failure.
    Instant
    getStartTime()
    When the scan started.
    URL
    getURL()
    The URL that was scanned.
    boolean
    isSuccess()
    True if the scan completed without fatal error.
